metadata.title: Rainbow Bridge Pet Memorial Wall | Honor Your Beloved Pets
metadata.description: Create a beautiful Rainbow Bridge memorial for your beloved pet who has crossed over. Share their story, upload photos, and let others light candles in their memory.
metadata.keywords: pet memorial, rainbow bridge, pet remembrance, dog memorial, cat memorial, pet tribute, pet loss, in loving memory

page.title: Pet Memorial Wall
page.description: A place to honor and remember our beloved pets who have crossed the Rainbow Bridge.

hero.title: Rainbow Bridge Memorial
hero.description: Create a gentle online memorial for your pet – with a glowing light in our Rainbow Garden, a personal story page, and the option to turn their photos into an AI memorial movie.

create.title: Create a Memorial
create.description: Create a beautiful memorial page to honor your beloved pet and share their story with the world.

list.searchPlaceholder: Search by pet name or owner name...
list.error: Failed to load memorials. Please try again.
list.empty: No memorials found. Be the first to create one!

detail.error: Failed to load memorial details. Please try again.
detail.messagePlaceholder: Leave a message of comfort or memory...
detail.candleError: Failed to light candle. Please try again.
detail.createVideoDescription: Transform this memorial into a beautiful video tribute. This will use credits from your account.
detail.videoStarted: Video generation started! Check back soon.
detail.videoError: Failed to start video generation. Please try again.

form.modalTitle: Leave a Memorial for Your Pet
form.modalDescription: Celebrate the life of your pet by sharing their story and photos.
form.successMessage: Thank you for submitting your memorial
form.successDescription: Your memorial has been created and is now visible on the memorial wall.
form.photosDescription: Upload 1-6 photos of your beloved pet. The first photo will be used as the cover image.
form.photosDescriptionRequired: Upload 1-6 photos of your beloved pet (required). The first photo will be used as the cover image.
form.maxImagesError: You can only upload up to 6 photos
form.uploadError: Failed to upload photo. Please try again.
form.messagePlaceholder: Leave a message in memory of your pet...
form.messageDescription: A short message that will be displayed on the memorial card (max 500 characters).
form.storyPlaceholder: Tell us the 'story' of your pet...
form.storyDescription: Share memories, funny moments, or anything you'd like others to know about your pet (max 5000 characters).
form.name: Your Name
form.emailDescription: We'll notify you when someone lights a candle for your pet.
form.displayName: Display my name with this memorial
form.displayNameDescription: Show your name on the memorial page.
form.publicMemorialDescription: Allow others to view this memorial on the memorial wall.
form.createError: Failed to create memorial. Please try again.
form.updateError: Failed to update memorial. Please try again.

videoGuide.title: Create a Memorial Video
videoGuide.description: Transform your pet's photos into a beautiful cinematic memorial video with AI. Perfect for honoring your beloved companion.

error.notOwner: You don't have permission to perform this action.
error.validation: Please check your input and try again.
error.imageRequired: At least one image is required.
error.videoExists: A video has already been generated for this memorial.
error.insufficientCredits: Insufficient credits. Please purchase more credits to generate a video.

candle.successMessage: Your candle has been lit in memory of this beloved pet.
candle.viewMemorialVideo: Watch the memorial video created for this pet
candle.createYourOwn: Create a beautiful AI memorial video for your own pet
